TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Loma a tilid no yincuminco == Kadadoedo no tilid a sowal no yincuminco, o Loma a tilid ko sapitilid to sowal no Taywan, o nitelekan ko sapidoedo to kalosowal no yincuminco i Taywan saka, o Latin a tilid ko sapitilid. I 1947 miheca o sakanga'ay a mipatenak no kiwkay, kalotilid no sowal nanoyaan sa marocek, maledef i kasaniyaro' mademak. Tahiikor i 2005 miheca pakayni yincuminco wiyinhuy ko kalomaoc mitelek to kalotilid no kasafinacadan, toya miheca 12 folad 15 romi'ad hapiw sato ko Kiwikkopo no Conghuaminko. Likisi Saki likisi, sarakatay masadak tilid no finacadan itiya pikowan ho no Netherland itiya, o midemakay sakitini i pasaetip a Pinpu finacadan, oya kafana'an no tamdaw, o nano iraay matilid to no Silaya finacadan tilid "Sinkang wenso" ato fangcalay cudad "Matay ratoh" a tilid. I 17-19 sician a Min, Cin a to'ek, mikowanay ono Minnanyu (Holowie) a payrangan a sowal palapayrang a tilid to saki Pinpu finacadan a sowal a radiw ato sasowalan . I kaDipongan a to'ek, nawhani maledef ko no Dipong a kiwiko, pakayni no Dipong a tilid to katakana ko sapitilid to kasafinacadan a sowal. Roma sato, sakiniyaro' a midemakay to finacadan a sowal tilid ato misolapay a hakasi, o Loma a tilid no finacadan ko sapitilid, tinako ni Ino Kaori a nidemakan. I 1945 miheca o picomod to no Conghuaminko ko Taywan, nawhani o pilakowaping satawo' kakihar, milalang ko kokmin sifo to pisano Loma, katakana no Dipong a tilid, o sowal no finacadan palano niyaro' a sowal, saka o "kalo sowal no kasaniyaro'" saheto o ngiha no kowaping ko sapitilid saan, saka ira ko no kowaping a ngiha ko tilid no kasafinacadan . I 1947 miheca miteka, seysiyo konghuy no Taywan misitapang pala Loma a tilid ko seysiyo, radiw ko pifalic no kalofinacadan a tilid. Ikor makilim mafo'ot pala no kowaping ko ngiha a tilid. I 1960 mihecaan miteka macakat to ko niyah harateng no Taywan itiya, o seysiyo konghuy misatatas mihalaka to 'adihayay kalotilid no kasafinacadan tangasa anini. I 1980 mihecaan, macowat to ko onto no yincuminco i Taywan, "Patikolen ko sowal no Ina" malo onto a salongoc ko nian. O kiwikopo nai 1992 miheca patorod to satakaraway kingkiwyin ci Li Rengui misolimetay to "Congko sasowalan no notimolan kanatal a sowal no finacadan a ngiha rocokan no tilid", i 1994 mihecaan mihapiw midemak. I 2001 miheca miteka ko Taywan midemak to Yincuminco wacay no pilifet to sowal, saki sarocod malacecayay matatodongay a tilidan matongal matongal sato, Sincenyin yincuminco i kasafinacadan to nikasasowalen, mikingkiway to sowal no yincuminco a sowal, hakasi no yincumin ato kiwikopo micikerohay to kowaping a wiyinhuy, i 2005 miheca 6 folad lomaoc "misetek to yincuminco a sowal rocokan a laoc", itiya miheca 12 folad 15 romi'ad patilid to kiwikopo to pahecian no pihapiw a midemak. Kasafinacadan a Loma tilid a nitelekan Laeno, kasafinacadan a Loma tilid a nitelekan (ano eca sarakatay kao tilid) ato nitelakan miheca (2013 miheca 1 folad). Kalotilid no sowal-16 sowal, tilid, ngiha no yincumin i Taywan Pacipingan, ira ko 26 ngiha a tilid to no Loma, roma ira ko pacipingan, halo ":" ato 6 a ciping to " ' ", " ^ ", " r ", " é ", " ɨ ", " ʉ ". 6 tada ngiha Pinengnengan a tilid 2. (PDF). 2005-12-15 (2018-05-07). (原始內容 (PDF) ).
S.PHON: == ɾo~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u == kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ a so~uwaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, o~u ɾo~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u sapitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan, o~u nitəɾəkan ko~u sapiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i tajwan saka, o~u ɾatin a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u sapitiɾiɬ~ɮ. i **** miħəʦa o~u sakaŋaʡaj a mipatənak no~u kiwkaj, kaɾo~utiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u so~uwaɾ nano~ujaan sa maro~uʦək, maɾəɬ~ɮəf i kasanijaro~uʡ maɬ~ɮəmak. taħiiko~ur i **** miħəʦa pakajni jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u wijinħo~u~uj ko~u kaɾo~umao~uʦ mitəɾək to~u kaɾo~utiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan, to~uja miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħapiw sato~u ko~u kiwikko~upo~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u. ɾikisi saki ɾikisi, sarakataj masaɬ~ɮak tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan itija piko~uwan ħo~u no~u nətħərɾanɬ~ɮ itija, o~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj sakitini i pasaətip a pinpo~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~uja kafanaʡan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u nano~u iraaj matiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u siɾaja finaʦaɬ~ɮan tiɾiɬ~ɮ "sinkaŋ wənso~u" ato~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ "mataj rato~uħ" a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. i **-** siʦian a min, ʦin a to~uʡək, miko~uwanaj o~uno~u minnanjo~u~u (ħo~uɾo~uwiə) a pajraŋan a so~uwaɾ paɾapajraŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u saki pinpo~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ a raɬ~ɮiw ato~u saso~uwaɾan . i kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a to~uʡək, nawħani maɾəɬ~ɮəf ko~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kiwiko~u, pakajni no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u katakana ko~u sapitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ. ro~uma sato~u, sakinijaro~uʡ a miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ tiɾiɬ~ɮ ato~u miso~uɾapaj a ħakasi, o~u ɾo~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u sapitiɾiɬ~ɮ, tinako~u ni ino~u kao~uri a niɬ~ɮəmakan. i **** miħəʦa o~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ko~u tajwan, nawħani o~u piɾako~uwapiŋ satawo~uʡ kakiħar, miɾaɾaŋ ko~u ko~ukmin sifo~u to~u pisano~u ɾo~uma, katakana no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan paɾano~u nijaro~uʡ a so~uwaɾ, saka o~u "kaɾo~u so~uwaɾ no~u kasanijaro~uʡ" saħəto~u o~u ŋiħa no~u ko~uwapiŋ ko~u sapitiɾiɬ~ɮ saan, saka ira ko~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ a ŋiħa ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan . i **** miħəʦa mitəka, səjsijo~u ko~uŋħo~u~uj no~u tajwan misitapaŋ paɾa ɾo~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u səjsijo~u, raɬ~ɮiw ko~u pifaɾiʦ no~u kaɾo~ufinaʦaɬ~ɮan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. iko~ur makiɾim mafo~uʡo~ut paɾa no~u ko~uwapiŋ ko~u ŋiħa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. i **** miħəʦaan mitəka maʦakat to~u ko~u nijaħ ħaratəŋ no~u tajwan itija, o~u səjsijo~u ko~uŋħo~u~uj misatatas miħaɾaka to~u ʡaɬ~ɮiħajaj kaɾo~utiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan taŋasa anini. i **** miħəʦaan, maʦo~uwat to~u ko~u o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i tajwan, "patiko~uɾən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina" maɾo~u o~unto~u a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ ko~u nian. o~u kiwiko~upo~u nai **** miħəʦa pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u satakarawaj kiŋkiwjin ʦi ɾi rəŋo~u~ui miso~uɾimətaj to~u "ʦo~uŋko~u saso~uwaɾan no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ŋiħa ro~uʦo~ukan no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ", i **** miħəʦaan miħapiw miɬ~ɮəmak. i **** miħəʦa mitəka ko~u tajwan miɬ~ɮəmak to~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u waʦaj no~u piɾifət to~u so~uwaɾ, saki saro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ maɾaʦəʦajaj matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮan mato~uŋaɾ mato~uŋaɾ sato~u, sinʦənjin jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan to~u nikasaso~uwaɾən, mikiŋkiwaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a so~uwaɾ, ħakasi no~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u kiwiko~upo~u miʦikəro~uħaj to~u ko~uwapiŋ a wijinħo~u~uj, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ɾo~umao~uʦ "misətək to~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a so~uwaɾ ro~uʦo~ukan a ɾao~uʦ", itija miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ patiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u kiwiko~upo~u to~u paħəʦian no~u piħapiw a miɬ~ɮəmak. kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan a ɾo~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ a nitəɾəkan ɾaəno~u, kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan a ɾo~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ a nitəɾəkan (ano~u əʦa sarakataj kao~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ) ato~u nitəɾakan miħəʦa (**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ). kaɾo~utiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u so~uwaɾ-** so~uwaɾ, tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ŋiħa no~u jinʦo~u~umin i tajwan paʦipiŋan, ira ko~u ** ŋiħa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ɾo~uma, ro~uma ira ko~u paʦipiŋan, ħaɾo~u ":" ato~u * a ʦipiŋ to~u " ʡ ", " ʔ ", " r ", " * ", " * ", " * ". * taɬ~ɮa ŋiħa pinəŋnəŋan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ *. (pɬ~ɮf). ****-**-** (****-**-**). (**** (pɬ~ɮf) ).
S.FORM: == Loma a tilid no yincuminco == Kadadoedo no tilid a sowal no yincuminco, o Loma a tilid ko sapitilid to sowal no Taywan, o nitelekan ko sapidoedo to kalosowal no yincuminco i Taywan saka, o Latin a tilid ko sapitilid. I 1947 miheca o sakanga'ay a mipatenak no kiwkay, kalotilid no sowal nanoyaan sa marocek, maledef i kasaniyaro' mademak. Tahiikor i 2005 miheca pakayni yincuminco wiyinhuy ko kalomaoc mitelek to kalotilid no kasafinacadan, toya miheca 12 folad 15 romi'ad hapiw sato ko Kiwikkopo no Conghuaminko. Likisi Saki likisi, sarakatay masadak tilid no finacadan itiya pikowan ho no Netherland itiya, o midemakay sakitini i pasaetip a Pinpu finacadan, oya kafana'an no tamdaw, o nano iraay matilid to no Silaya finacadan tilid "Sinkang wenso" ato fangcalay cudad "Matay ratoh" a tilid. I 17-19 sician a Min, Cin a to'ek, mikowanay ono Minnanyu (Holowie) a payrangan a sowal palapayrang a tilid to saki Pinpu finacadan a sowal a radiw ato sasowalan . I kaDipongan a to'ek, nawhani maledef ko no Dipong a kiwiko, pakayni no Dipong a tilid to katakana ko sapitilid to kasafinacadan a sowal. Roma sato, sakiniyaro' a midemakay to finacadan a sowal tilid ato misolapay a hakasi, o Loma a tilid no finacadan ko sapitilid, tinako ni Ino Kaori a nidemakan. I 1945 miheca o picomod to no Conghuaminko ko Taywan, nawhani o pilakowaping satawo' kakihar, milalang ko kokmin sifo to pisano Loma, katakana no Dipong a tilid, o sowal no finacadan palano niyaro' a sowal, saka o "kalo sowal no kasaniyaro'" saheto o ngiha no kowaping ko sapitilid saan, saka ira ko no kowaping a ngiha ko tilid no kasafinacadan . I 1947 miheca miteka, seysiyo konghuy no Taywan misitapang pala Loma a tilid ko seysiyo, radiw ko pifalic no kalofinacadan a tilid. Ikor makilim mafo'ot pala no kowaping ko ngiha a tilid. I 1960 mihecaan miteka macakat to ko niyah harateng no Taywan itiya, o seysiyo konghuy misatatas mihalaka to 'adihayay kalotilid no kasafinacadan tangasa anini. I 1980 mihecaan, macowat to ko onto no yincuminco i Taywan, "Patikolen ko sowal no Ina" malo onto a salongoc ko nian. O kiwikopo nai 1992 miheca patorod to satakaraway kingkiwyin ci Li Rengui misolimetay to "Congko sasowalan no notimolan kanatal a sowal no finacadan a ngiha rocokan no tilid", i 1994 mihecaan mihapiw midemak. I 2001 miheca miteka ko Taywan midemak to Yincuminco wacay no pilifet to sowal, saki sarocod malacecayay matatodongay a tilidan matongal matongal sato, Sincenyin yincuminco i kasafinacadan to nikasasowalen, mikingkiway to sowal no yincuminco a sowal, hakasi no yincumin ato kiwikopo micikerohay to kowaping a wiyinhuy, i 2005 miheca 6 folad lomaoc "misetek to yincuminco a sowal rocokan a laoc", itiya miheca 12 folad 15 romi'ad patilid to kiwikopo to pahecian no pihapiw a midemak. Kasafinacadan a Loma tilid a nitelekan Laeno, kasafinacadan a Loma tilid a nitelekan (ano eca sarakatay kao tilid) ato nitelakan miheca (2013 miheca 1 folad). Kalotilid no sowal-16 sowal, tilid, ngiha no yincumin i Taywan Pacipingan, ira ko 26 ngiha a tilid to no Loma, roma ira ko pacipingan, halo ":" ato 6 a ciping to " ' ", " ^ ", " r ", " é ", " ɨ ", " ʉ ". 6 tada ngiha Pinengnengan a tilid 2. (PDF). 2005-12-15 (2018-05-07). (原始內容 (PDF) ).
S.PHON: == ɾo~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u == kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ a so~uwaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, o~u ɾo~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u sapitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan, o~u nitəɾəkan ko~u sapiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i tajwan saka, o~u ɾatin a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u sapitiɾiɬ~ɮ. i **** miħəʦa o~u sakaŋaʡaj a mipatənak no~u kiwkaj, kaɾo~utiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u so~uwaɾ nano~ujaan sa maro~uʦək, maɾəɬ~ɮəf i kasanijaro~uʡ maɬ~ɮəmak. taħiiko~ur i **** miħəʦa pakajni jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u wijinħo~u~uj ko~u kaɾo~umao~uʦ mitəɾək to~u kaɾo~utiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan, to~uja miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħapiw sato~u ko~u kiwikko~upo~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u. ɾikisi saki ɾikisi, sarakataj masaɬ~ɮak tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan itija piko~uwan ħo~u no~u nətħərɾanɬ~ɮ itija, o~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj sakitini i pasaətip a pinpo~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~uja kafanaʡan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u nano~u iraaj matiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u siɾaja finaʦaɬ~ɮan tiɾiɬ~ɮ "sinkaŋ wənso~u" ato~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ "mataj rato~uħ" a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. i **-** siʦian a min, ʦin a to~uʡək, miko~uwanaj o~uno~u minnanjo~u~u (ħo~uɾo~uwiə) a pajraŋan a so~uwaɾ paɾapajraŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u saki pinpo~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ a raɬ~ɮiw ato~u saso~uwaɾan . i kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a to~uʡək, nawħani maɾəɬ~ɮəf ko~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kiwiko~u, pakajni no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u katakana ko~u sapitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ. ro~uma sato~u, sakinijaro~uʡ a miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ tiɾiɬ~ɮ ato~u miso~uɾapaj a ħakasi, o~u ɾo~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u sapitiɾiɬ~ɮ, tinako~u ni ino~u kao~uri a niɬ~ɮəmakan. i **** miħəʦa o~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ko~u tajwan, nawħani o~u piɾako~uwapiŋ satawo~uʡ kakiħar, miɾaɾaŋ ko~u ko~ukmin sifo~u to~u pisano~u ɾo~uma, katakana no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan paɾano~u nijaro~uʡ a so~uwaɾ, saka o~u "kaɾo~u so~uwaɾ no~u kasanijaro~uʡ" saħəto~u o~u ŋiħa no~u ko~uwapiŋ ko~u sapitiɾiɬ~ɮ saan, saka ira ko~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ a ŋiħa ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan . i **** miħəʦa mitəka, səjsijo~u ko~uŋħo~u~uj no~u tajwan misitapaŋ paɾa ɾo~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u səjsijo~u, raɬ~ɮiw ko~u pifaɾiʦ no~u kaɾo~ufinaʦaɬ~ɮan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. iko~ur makiɾim mafo~uʡo~ut paɾa no~u ko~uwapiŋ ko~u ŋiħa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. i **** miħəʦaan mitəka maʦakat to~u ko~u nijaħ ħaratəŋ no~u tajwan itija, o~u səjsijo~u ko~uŋħo~u~uj misatatas miħaɾaka to~u ʡaɬ~ɮiħajaj kaɾo~utiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan taŋasa anini. i **** miħəʦaan, maʦo~uwat to~u ko~u o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i tajwan, "patiko~uɾən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina" maɾo~u o~unto~u a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ ko~u nian. o~u kiwiko~upo~u nai **** miħəʦa pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u satakarawaj kiŋkiwjin ʦi ɾi rəŋo~u~ui miso~uɾimətaj to~u "ʦo~uŋko~u saso~uwaɾan no~u no~utimo~uɾan kanataɾ a so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ŋiħa ro~uʦo~ukan no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ", i **** miħəʦaan miħapiw miɬ~ɮəmak. i **** miħəʦa mitəka ko~u tajwan miɬ~ɮəmak to~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u waʦaj no~u piɾifət to~u so~uwaɾ, saki saro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ maɾaʦəʦajaj matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮan mato~uŋaɾ mato~uŋaɾ sato~u, sinʦənjin jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan to~u nikasaso~uwaɾən, mikiŋkiwaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a so~uwaɾ, ħakasi no~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u kiwiko~upo~u miʦikəro~uħaj to~u ko~uwapiŋ a wijinħo~u~uj, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ɾo~umao~uʦ "misətək to~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a so~uwaɾ ro~uʦo~ukan a ɾao~uʦ", itija miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ patiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u kiwiko~upo~u to~u paħəʦian no~u piħapiw a miɬ~ɮəmak. kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan a ɾo~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ a nitəɾəkan ɾaəno~u, kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan a ɾo~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ a nitəɾəkan (ano~u əʦa sarakataj kao~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ) ato~u nitəɾakan miħəʦa (**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ). kaɾo~utiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u so~uwaɾ-** so~uwaɾ, tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ŋiħa no~u jinʦo~u~umin i tajwan paʦipiŋan, ira ko~u ** ŋiħa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ɾo~uma, ro~uma ira ko~u paʦipiŋan, ħaɾo~u ":" ato~u * a ʦipiŋ to~u " ʡ ", " ʔ ", " r ", " * ", " * ", " * ". * taɬ~ɮa ŋiħa pinəŋnəŋan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ *. (pɬ~ɮf). ****-**-** (****-**-**). (**** (pɬ~ɮf) ).
